dsl_rule.translation_notes: Gapping-Down Doji pattern translated as: (1) Close below previous close to confirm gap down, (2) Body percentage < 5% to identify doji (small body relative to range), (3) Open >= close to confirm doji equilibrium. Exit on break below prior day low (reversal failure). Stop loss set to 2% based on typical risk for pattern reversals. Success rate noted as 54-56% per source.

backtest_rule.reason: Gapping-Down Doji pattern translated as: (1) Close below previous close to confirm gap down, (2) Body percentage < 5% to identify doji (small body relative to range), (3) Open >= close to confirm doji equilibrium. Exit on break below prior day low (reversal failure). Stop loss set to 2% based on typical risk for pattern reversals. Success rate noted as 54-56% per source.

source_rule_text: Pattern name: Gapping-Down Doji - A doji candle that appears with a price gap below the prior day's close, representing a stalemate between bulls and bears with bullish reversal tendency
